provider: Codex CLI via DAACS desktop/Tauri live round

domains.name: meeting-room-reservation
domains.prompt: 회의실 예약 Vite React TS 웹앱 제작. 브라우저 안에서 동작하고, 예약 정보는 localStorage에 저장하며, 샘플 회의실 데이터와 필터, 충돌/불가/잘못된 시간 방지 흐름을 포함한다.
domains.modification_request: verifier가 localStorage persistence flow 증거 부족을 지적했고, 같은 산출물에서 재검증 라운드를 돌려 build와 smoke 증거를 보강했다.
evidence: DAACS desktop/Tauri office_state contains PM, frontend implementation, reviewer, verifier task history for the meeting-room reservation app.
npm run build exited 0; Vite built dist/index.html, CSS, and JS assets successfully.
npm run smoke exited 0; stdout: Smoke passed: 6 core checks.
Browser user flow passed: create a reservation, block overlapping same-room booking, reload, and confirm the saved reservation remains visible.
Artifact includes package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/styles.css, and scripts/smoke.mjs.
Verifier repair loop closed the missing localStorage persistence evidence gap on the same artifact.

domains.name: warehouse-inventory-picking-dashboard
domains.prompt: 창고 재고 피킹 대시보드 웹앱 제작. 백엔드/로그인 없이 샘플 주문/재고 데이터, 피킹 상태, 완료 목록, 재고 부족, 필터, localStorage 저장을 포함한다.
domains.modification_request: reviewer가 완료 주문 되돌리기와 재고 중복 차감 위험을 지적했고, 같은 산출물에서 완료 주문 잠금 repair를 수행한 뒤 reviewer/verifier가 통과했다.
evidence: DAACS desktop/Tauri office_state contains PM, frontend implementation, reviewer, verifier task history for the warehouse picking dashboard.
npm run build exited 0; Vite built dist/index.html, CSS, and JS assets successfully.
npm run smoke exited 0; stdout: Smoke checks passed: dashboard UI, persistence hooks, filters, and scripts are present.
Browser user flow passed: complete a picking order, confirm no undo/re-pick button exists, reload, and confirm completed order persistence.
Artifact includes package.json, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.node.json, vite.config.ts, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/styles.css, and scripts/smoke.mjs.
